meta.purpose: Visual Stability Auto-Fix Layer — Self-healing system for V5.9 production
meta.series: V5.9 TERMINAL — Auto-fix only modifies OUTPUT renderTree, never state or engine logic

step_1_auto_fix_engine.main_function: autoFixVisualAnomalies(renderTree, state, options) → { fixed, fixType, renderTree, diagnostics }
step_1_auto_fix_engine.rule: Only modify OUTPUT renderTree. Never modify state or engine logic.

issues.name: Broken hierarchy
issues.detects: Missing hero+secondary layers, competing hero objects (top-level + nested)

issues.name: Inconsistent spacing tokens
issues.detects: rpx values outside approved scale (14 approved values: 0,16,18,20,22,24,28,32,36,40,44,48,80,140)

issues.name: Color palette violations
issues.detects: Unapproved hex colors (5 approved), unapproved gold rgba opacities (15 approved values)

issues.name: Empty state misrendering
issues.detects: Page with no content, no empty state component, and no hero

strategies.action: revert to V5.9 base layout template (preserves activeTab, hero data exists)
collapse into grouped sections (truncate sections.items to 10, flowRelics to 20)
enforce single hero + secondary flow rule (extract first hero, collapse competing)
flag as autofixed (structural correction requires code change)
flag as autofixed (structural correction requires code change)
inject empty state section with autoInjected flag

step_3_auto_recovery_strategies.priority_order: A → D → B → C → G → E → F (layout drift always first)

step_4_fallback_render_template.function: getFallbackRenderTemplate() → deep clone of frozen template

step_5_safe_render_guarantee.function: guaranteeSafeRender(renderTree, state, options) → { safe, usedFallback, renderTree }
guarantees: no blank screen ever occurs — null/corrupt renderTree falls back immediately
no broken UI states reach user — all failures are intercepted and corrected
all failures degrade gracefully — fallback template has hero, action, content, background

step_6_observability_integration.flow: detect anomaly → log to observer → autoFix → record fix → update health metrics

step_7_self_heal_loop_limit.per_page_tracking: fixAttempts[pageName] increments on each autoFixVisualAnomalies call
step_7_self_heal_loop_limit.behavior_on_exceed: Force SAFE MODE → return base layout with 'forced_safe_mode' flag
step_7_self_heal_loop_limit.reset: resetAutofixState() clears all counters and safe mode flag

files_created.purpose: Full auto-fix engine — 7 detectors, 7 fix strategies, safe render guarantee, observer integration
Ultimate safe fallback render template definition

evidence: All 7 issue types have dedicated detectors AND fix strategies
autoFixVisualAnomalies runs all detectors in priority order, applying fixes in sequence
Each fix preserves as much original data as possible (page identity, hero content)
Layout drift (structural) is fixed first, followed by hierarchy, then content issues
guaranteeSafeRender() intercepts null/undefined/corrupt renderTree before it reaches UI
autoFixVisualAnomalies always returns a valid renderTree — even on null input
MAX_FIX_ATTEMPTS=2 prevents infinite loops; exceeded → forced safe mode with clean template
Fallback render template has all required structure (hero, action, content, background)
3-level safety net: auto-fix → fallback template → forced safe mode
getFallbackRenderTemplate() always returns a deep-cloned, valid renderTree
v59_fallback_render.json defines the ultimate fallback with hero, action, condensed content, neutral background
All fallback trees have _autofixed, _fallbackRender, or _safeFallback flags for traceability
Auto-fix NEVER modifies state or engine logic — only the OUTPUT renderTree
All fix strategies are pure functions: same input renderTree → same fixed output
Fix attempts are tracked per page; identical anomalies produce identical fixes
No side effects on runtime state — observer integration is read-only logging
MAX_FIX_ATTEMPTS = 2 hard limit per page
Third attempt forces SAFE MODE with 'forced_safe_mode' fix type
resetAutofixState() clears all counters
isSafeModeForced() provides runtime visibility into state
Observability integration logs each attempt for diagnostics

summary.final_verdict: V5.9 production system is self-healing. All visual inconsistencies detectable and correctable at runtime. No blank screen, no broken UI, no infinite loops.
